hero.label: Frozen Island – Bali
hero.title: Tropical freshness in its purest form.
hero.subtitle: Discover our exotic frozen fruits, served in their own natural shell. 100% natural, no additives. A unique sensory experience in the heart of Bali.

natural.title: 100% natural
natural.description: No additives, no preservatives. Just fresh Bali fruits, frozen to perfection.

authentic.title: Served in its own fruit
authentic.description: Each fruit is served in its natural shell for an authentic, zero-waste experience.

vibe.title: Bali spirit, relaxed luxury
vibe.description: An oasis of freshness where nature meets tropical refinement.

experience.title: The On-Site Experience
experience.subtitle: A frozen oasis in a burning world.
experience.description: Dive into a tropical atmosphere where every detail matters: bamboo wood, natural fabrics, soft music. Frozen Island is a sanctuary of freshness where time stands still.

finalCta.title: Ready to taste the tropics?
finalCta.description: Come visit us in Bali or contact us to privatize the space.

hero.title: The Frozen Island Experience
hero.subtitle: More than a frozen fruit, it's a sensory journey.

intro.title: A frozen oasis in the heart of Bali
intro.description: Frozen Island is not just a place, it's a tropical escape. As soon as you cross the threshold, you're transported to a universe where nature and refinement meet.

step1.title: Choose your fruit
step1.description: Mango, coconut, dragon fruit, passion fruit... Let your cravings guide you.

step2.title: We prepare it in front of you
step2.description: Each fruit is handcrafted, carefully frozen in its natural shell.

step3.title: Savor the moment
step3.description: Settle in, breathe. Let the tropical freshness wash over you.

ambiance.title: Ambiance & Design
ambiance.description: Natural materials, soft lighting, chillwave playlist. Frozen Island is designed like a miniature resort: bamboo, linen, sand. Every element breathes relaxed luxury.
ambiance.quote: « A sanctuary of freshness where time stands still. »

fruits.title: Frozen Fruits
fruits.subtitle: Each fruit is a frozen work of art.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: The Frozen Island universe in images.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: Frozen Island was born from a passion for Bali and its extraordinary tropical fruits. We wanted to create a place where nature expresses itself in all its splendor, without artifice. Each frozen fruit is a celebration of tropical generosity.

natural.title: 100% Natural
natural.description: Zero additives, zero preservatives. Only fresh fruit and love.

local.title: Local Products
local.description: We prioritize fruits grown in Bali and Indonesia.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: A question? An event to organize? Write to us.
